TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Maw-ce-tun, title = Maw-ce-tun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maw-ce-tun} }

S.FORM: == Maw-ce-tunÊØõÊæ§Êù± == Maw-ce-tun yu mahid nikaudip ÊØõÊæ§Êù±Êó©Âπ¥ÁîüÊ∂Ø caywal siwlu mihcaan caytu bulad tunem demiad, licuhen ci Maw-ce-tun i Hu-na-sen sing-tan-sin' Saw-san-cun. namaka enem a mihcaan, mipupuc tu tu lutuk ci Maw-ce-tun, pakan tu katalan, mikilim tu tayi, mikasuy, nikatinengan tu sulitan malingatu tu miedap misulit. caysiw lunem mihcaan Maw-ce-tun milecad tu ci Ay-de-cia.Se-nuo tu wama ci Maw-sun-se tu nikadan nu sakaudip mahida u "siidaay nu malukay". caysiw lusiw mihcaan caytu bulad tuwal dimiad, Maw-ce-min itida i Su-len-muo-se-ke kuncen kanatal nipiyukiw, milaydi tu kaka ci Maw-ce-tun misuli tu lilipaw, ci Maw-sun-sen "lusep mihcaan nikudan, paluma mikawaw henay tu malukay nu niyadu'an pacakay tu tuud. sipakayda i Cun-kuo nakamuan, sadikuday nu tuluay a mihcaan u siidaay nu malukay". 1893Âπ¥12Êúà26Êó•, ." mapatideng tu Cun-hua-zin-min-kun-he-kuo, ci Maw-ce-tun kinapina atu calekakaan nida ci Maw-ce-len musakamu tu wama ci Maw-sun-sen pasayda ci Maw-ce-len wamanida ci Maw-cu-sen micakay tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umahan, u udip tu ku madatengay, nanai' ku balucu' i malekakaay, hicahicaen musakamu kaisa mitengil. simsim satu kaku, caay kaw nu luma' acacay kina kawaw, pasusiakay tu a kawawan, tada madateng tu ahican ku nipisumad tu siakay, kya caay ka lahat kinakawaw, sisa paytem satu kaku mikilim tu ahican miedap ku pakuyucay nu malukay a dadana." ." caysiw caycay mihcaan tu palaludan, tayda ci Maw-ce-tun i Cen-sa, tayda i Sin'-sin micudad, sayaway makaadih tu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun "min-li-paw", matineng tu Sun-cun-san atu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun, ci Hun-sin itida i Kun-cuo mililid tu mihantayay nu hitay atu Hun-hua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, malingatu miedap ci Sun-cun-san ke-min-dan. masekin ni Maw-ce-tun ku Sin'-sin a cacudadan, i cacudadan paduhepit ci nida tu sapibelinaw tu Cin-caw, patideng tu min-kuo, patahekal patideng ci Sun-cun-san mala tabakiay nu Cun-tun, ci Kan-yu-wi malacon-li, ci Ling-ci-caw malasakay hekal nu tahudan, patideng musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanayuay nu bukesan. 1911Âπ¥Êò•, . lima bulad, labuay nu kanatal malingatu mibelin tu sihu pacakay tu dadan nu silamalay, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nu heni milabu tina kawawan, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nida maluayaw mipusut tu bukenida, pacicien nida ku pina nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan mipusut tu bukes. 5Êúà, . Wen-hua ta-ke-min atu nika balaki a nikaudip ÊñáÂåñÂ§ßÈù©ÂëΩÂèäÊôöÂπ¥ caysiw piccay mihcaan siwa a bulad, paytem ku masakaputay ni Lin-peaw, amipatay ci Maw-ce-tunang i nipikatacuwacuwaan, palekal tu nikalepacaw, siwa bulad pitu demiad ci lan-li-kuo pasayda i "Len-he-cin-duy" mihapu tu "yi-ci-cen-pei, siwa bulad walu demiad misulit ci Lin-peaw tu sapihapu tu " duducen ku kawaw, hidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ci Maw-ce-tun makatengil besut sa namaka Hng-cuo pasayda i San-hay, siwa a bulad caytu dimiad makatukuh i Pei-cin, taluma' i Cun-hay pahanhan. ci Cuo-en mihapu miwawah tu la-ta miadih tu tapukuwan, kya matineng tu nikaydaan nu hikuki, nikadan ci Cuo-en mihapuac tu sakaytapukuwan a kawawan, deben namin ku pahikukian, pasaluimengen namin ku hikuki, ci kalamkam ci Maw-ce-tun tayni pakatineng a ci Cuo-en naicuwa matineng tu nipilaliw ni Lin-pewan, itini ci Cuo-en miwanan milimad taydan i zen-min-ta-hun timula nu caycaywal a dabekan. 1971Âπ¥9Êúà, 118ÂÆ§. Ni-ke'-sen, midis ci Lin, midis ci Kug atu midis ci Ten caysiw piccay mihcaan lim bulad tusiw demiad, mihang ci Maw-ce-tun ci Cuo-en-lay, tawya nu dimiad cunhun pasayda ci Ni-ke'-sen patahekal tu "kumuan", manamuh tu nikatayni ni Ci-sin-ci, mihimicu tu sasakamuen. putu bulad caynem demiad, Cuo Mea tusa a kanatalan malecad ku nipihapuan, mihapu tu nika tayni ni Ni-ke'-sen, caysep bulad tunem demiad, tusa nu kanatalan pulung masasudang malaheci kina kawawan. caysep bulad tulim demiad, Lein-he-kuo tahun malakuuy ku nikasasuwalan, pabelih tu Cun-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i lein-he-kuo hamin nu kinlian, tawya a demiad ci Maw-ce-tun miawda ci Cuo-en-lay atu sakayhekalan nu tademaw mikaygisa, paytem patideng tu Cun-kuo dayhiw sapikaygi tu Lein-ta. caysiw picnem mihcaan siw bulad wal demiad, mahetik ku idang ni Maw-ce-tun, salabi sa ku tahuda mididaw ci Maw-ce-tun ngan, siw bulat siw demiad teban nu labii tu caysep nu tukian, matulin tu sepat a tukian milawlaw tu balucu', tepek satu ku balucu ni Maw-ce-tun. 1976Âπ¥9Êúà8Êó•, . amica yu maudip henay ci Maw-ce-tun saan anu mapatay kaku tuduhen kaku sa, katepekan ni Maw-ce-tun tawya a demiad paytem a hidan tu ku kidu nida tahadauc sa. .
S.PHON: == maw- ¶…ô-tun*** == maw- ¶…ô-tun ju maƒßid nikaudip ******* ¶ajwar~…æ siwr~…æu miƒß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…æad tun…ôm d…ômiad, r~…æi ¶uƒß…ôn ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ƒßu-na-s…ôn si≈ã-tan-sin î~ ° saw-san- ¶un. namaka …ôn…ôm a miƒß ¶aan, mipupu ¶ tu tu r~…æutuk ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun, pakan tu katar~…æan, mikir~…æim tu taji, mikasuj, nikatin…ô≈ãan tu sur~…æitan mar~…æi≈ãatu tu mi…ôdap misur~…æit. ¶ajsiw r~…æun…ôm miƒß ¶aan maw- ¶…ô-tun mir~…æ…ô ¶ad tu ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia.s…ô-nuo tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ô tu nikadan nu sakaudip maƒßida u "siidaaj nu mar~…æukaj". ¶ajsiw r~…æusiw miƒß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…æad tuwar~…æ dimiad, maw- ¶…ô-min itida i su-r~…æ…ôn-muo-s…ô-k…ô kun ¶…ôn kanatar~…æ nipijukiw, mir~…æajdi tu kaka ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun misur~…æi tu r~…æir~…æipaw, ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn "r~…æus…ôp miƒß ¶aan nikudan, par~…æuma mikawaw ƒß…ônaj tu mar~…æukaj nu nijadu î~ °an pa ¶akaj tu tuud. sipakajda i ¶un-kuo nakamuan, sadikudaj nu tur~…æuaj a miƒß ¶aan u siidaaj nu mar~…æukaj". ***********, ." mapatid…ô≈ã tu ¶un-ƒßua-zin-min-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun kinapina atu ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan nida ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…æ…ôn musakamu tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn pasajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…æ…ôn wamanida ¶i maw- ¶u-s…ôn mi ¶akaj tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umaƒßan, u udip tu ku madat…ô≈ãaj, nanai î~ ° ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° i mar~…æ…ôkakaaj, ƒßi ¶aƒßi ¶a…ôn musakamu kaisa mit…ô≈ãir~…æ. simsim satu kaku, ¶aaj kaw nu r~…æuma î~ ° a ¶a ¶aj kina kawaw, pasusiakaj tu a kawawan, tada madat…ô≈ã tu aƒßi ¶an ku nipisumad tu siakaj, kja ¶aaj ka r~…æaƒßat kinakawaw, sisa pajt…ôm satu kaku mikir~…æim tu aƒßi ¶an mi…ôdap ku pakuju ¶aj nu mar~…æukaj a dadana." ." ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan tu par~…æar~…æudan, tajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ¶…ôn-sa, tajda i sin î~ °-sin mi ¶udad, sajawaj makaadiƒß tu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ƒßun "min-r~…æi-paw", matin…ô≈ã tu sun- ¶un-san atu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ƒßun, ¶i ƒßun-sin itida i kun- ¶uo mir~…æir~…æid tu miƒßantajaj nu ƒßitaj atu ƒßun-ƒßua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, mar~…æi≈ãatu mi…ôdap ¶i sun- ¶un-san k…ô-min-dan. mas…ôkin ni maw- ¶…ô-tun ku sin î~ °-sin a ¶a ¶udadan, i ¶a ¶udadan paduƒß…ôpit ¶i nida tu sapib…ôr~…æinaw tu ¶in- ¶aw, patid…ô≈ã tu min-kuo, pataƒß…ôkar~…æ patid…ô≈ã ¶i sun- ¶un-san mar~…æa tabakiaj nu ¶un-tun, ¶i kan-ju-wi mar~…æa ¶on-r~…æi, ¶i r~…æi≈ã- ¶i- ¶aw mar~…æasakaj ƒß…ôkar~…æ nu taƒßudan, patid…ô≈ã musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanajuaj nu buk…ôsan. ******, . r~…æima bur~…æad, r~…æabuaj nu kanatar~…æ mar~…æi≈ãatu mib…ôr~…æin tu siƒßu pa ¶akaj tu dadan nu sir~…æamar~…æaj, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nu ƒß…ôni mir~…æabu tina kawawan, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nida mar~…æuajaw mipusut tu buk…ônida, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nida ku pina nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu tad…ômawan mipusut tu buk…ôs. **, . w…ôn-ƒßua ta-k…ô-min atu nika bar~…æaki a nikaudip ******** ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj miƒß ¶aan siwa a bur~…æad, pajt…ôm ku masakaputaj ni r~…æin-p…ôaw, amipataj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tuna≈ã i nipikata ¶uwa ¶uwaan, par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, siwa bur~…æad pitu d…ômiad ¶i r~…æan-r~…æi-kuo pasajda i "r~…æ…ôn-ƒß…ô- ¶in-duj" miƒßapu tu "ji- ¶i- ¶…ôn-p…ôi, siwa bur~…æad war~…æu d…ômiad misur~…æit ¶i r~…æin-p…ôaw tu sapiƒßapu tu " dudu ¶…ôn ku kawaw, ƒßidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun makat…ô≈ãir~…æ b…ôsut sa namaka ƒß≈ã- ¶uo pasajda i san-ƒßaj, siwa a bur~…æad ¶ajtu dimiad makatukuƒß i p…ôi- ¶in, tar~…æuma î~ ° i ¶un-ƒßaj paƒßanƒßan. ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miƒßapu miwawaƒß tu r~…æa-ta miadiƒß tu tapukuwan, kja matin…ô≈ã tu nikajdaan nu ƒßikuki, nikadan ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miƒßapua ¶ tu sakajtapukuwan a kawawan, d…ôb…ôn namin ku paƒßikukian, pasar~…æuim…ô≈ã…ôn namin ku ƒßikuki, ¶i kar~…æamkam ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun tajni pakatin…ô≈ã a ¶i ¶uo-…ôn nai ¶uwa matin…ô≈ã tu nipir~…æar~…æiw ni r~…æin-p…ôwan, itini ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miwanan mir~…æimad tajdan i z…ôn-min-ta-ƒßun timur~…æa nu ¶aj ¶ajwar~…æ a dab…ôkan. *******, ****. ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn, midis ¶i r~…æin, midis ¶i kug atu midis ¶i t…ôn ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj miƒß ¶aan r~…æim bur~…æad tusiw d…ômiad, miƒßa≈ã ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…æaj, tawja nu dimiad ¶unƒßun pasajda ¶i ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn pataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu "kumuan", manamuƒß tu nikatajni ni ¶i-sin- ¶i, miƒßimi ¶u tu sasakamu…ôn. putu bur~…æad ¶ajn…ôm d…ômiad, ¶uo m…ôa tusa a kanatar~…æan mar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku nipiƒßapuan, miƒßapu tu nika tajni ni ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn, ¶ajs…ôp bur~…æad tun…ôm d…ômiad, tusa nu kanatar~…æan pur~…æu≈ã masasuda≈ã mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i kina kawawan. ¶ajs…ôp bur~…æad tur~…æim d…ômiad, r~…æ…ôin-ƒß…ô-kuo taƒßun mar~…æakuuj ku nikasasuwar~…æan, pab…ôr~…æiƒß tu ¶un-ƒßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo itida i r~…æ…ôin-ƒß…ô-kuo ƒßamin nu kinr~…æian, tawja a d…ômiad ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun miawda ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…æaj atu sakajƒß…ôkar~…æan nu tad…ômaw mikajgisa, pajt…ôm patid…ô≈ã tu ¶un-kuo dajƒßiw sapikajgi tu r~…æ…ôin-ta. ¶ajsiw pi ¶n…ôm miƒß ¶aan siw bur~…æad war~…æ d…ômiad, maƒß…ôtik ku ida≈ã ni maw- ¶…ô-tun, sar~…æabi sa ku taƒßuda mididaw ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun ≈ãan, siw bur~…æat siw d…ômiad t…ôban nu r~…æabii tu ¶ajs…ôp nu tukian, matur~…æin tu s…ôpat a tukian mir~…æawr~…æaw tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ °, t…ôp…ôk satu ku bar~…æu ¶u ni maw- ¶…ô-tun. *********, . ami ¶a ju maudip ƒß…ônaj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun saan anu mapataj kaku tuduƒß…ôn kaku sa, kat…ôp…ôkan ni maw- ¶…ô-tun tawja a d…ômiad pajt…ôm a ƒßidan tu ku kidu nida taƒßadau ¶ sa. .
S.FORM: == Maw-ce-tunÊØõÊæ§Êù± == Maw-ce-tun yu mahid nikaudip ÊØõÊæ§Êù±Êó©Âπ¥ÁîüÊ∂Ø caywal siwlu mihcaan caytu bulad tunem demiad, licuhen ci Maw-ce-tun i Hu-na-sen sing-tan-sin' Saw-san-cun. namaka enem a mihcaan, mipupuc tu tu lutuk ci Maw-ce-tun, pakan tu katalan, mikilim tu tayi, mikasuy, nikatinengan tu sulitan malingatu tu miedap misulit. caysiw lunem mihcaan Maw-ce-tun milecad tu ci Ay-de-cia.Se-nuo tu wama ci Maw-sun-se tu nikadan nu sakaudip mahida u "siidaay nu malukay". caysiw lusiw mihcaan caytu bulad tuwal dimiad, Maw-ce-min itida i Su-len-muo-se-ke kuncen kanatal nipiyukiw, milaydi tu kaka ci Maw-ce-tun misuli tu lilipaw, ci Maw-sun-sen "lusep mihcaan nikudan, paluma mikawaw henay tu malukay nu niyadu'an pacakay tu tuud. sipakayda i Cun-kuo nakamuan, sadikuday nu tuluay a mihcaan u siidaay nu malukay". 1893Âπ¥12Êúà26Êó•, ." mapatideng tu Cun-hua-zin-min-kun-he-kuo, ci Maw-ce-tun kinapina atu calekakaan nida ci Maw-ce-len musakamu tu wama ci Maw-sun-sen pasayda ci Maw-ce-len wamanida ci Maw-cu-sen micakay tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umahan, u udip tu ku madatengay, nanai' ku balucu' i malekakaay, hicahicaen musakamu kaisa mitengil. simsim satu kaku, caay kaw nu luma' acacay kina kawaw, pasusiakay tu a kawawan, tada madateng tu ahican ku nipisumad tu siakay, kya caay ka lahat kinakawaw, sisa paytem satu kaku mikilim tu ahican miedap ku pakuyucay nu malukay a dadana." ." caysiw caycay mihcaan tu palaludan, tayda ci Maw-ce-tun i Cen-sa, tayda i Sin'-sin micudad, sayaway makaadih tu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun "min-li-paw", matineng tu Sun-cun-san atu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun, ci Hun-sin itida i Kun-cuo mililid tu mihantayay nu hitay atu Hun-hua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, malingatu miedap ci Sun-cun-san ke-min-dan. masekin ni Maw-ce-tun ku Sin'-sin a cacudadan, i cacudadan paduhepit ci nida tu sapibelinaw tu Cin-caw, patideng tu min-kuo, patahekal patideng ci Sun-cun-san mala tabakiay nu Cun-tun, ci Kan-yu-wi malacon-li, ci Ling-ci-caw malasakay hekal nu tahudan, patideng musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanayuay nu bukesan. 1911Âπ¥Êò•, . lima bulad, labuay nu kanatal malingatu mibelin tu sihu pacakay tu dadan nu silamalay, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nu heni milabu tina kawawan, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nida maluayaw mipusut tu bukenida, pacicien nida ku pina nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan mipusut tu bukes. 5Êúà, . Wen-hua ta-ke-min atu nika balaki a nikaudip ÊñáÂåñÂ§ßÈù©ÂëΩÂèäÊôöÂπ¥ caysiw piccay mihcaan siwa a bulad, paytem ku masakaputay ni Lin-peaw, amipatay ci Maw-ce-tunang i nipikatacuwacuwaan, palekal tu nikalepacaw, siwa bulad pitu demiad ci lan-li-kuo pasayda i "Len-he-cin-duy" mihapu tu "yi-ci-cen-pei, siwa bulad walu demiad misulit ci Lin-peaw tu sapihapu tu " duducen ku kawaw, hidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ci Maw-ce-tun makatengil besut sa namaka Hng-cuo pasayda i San-hay, siwa a bulad caytu dimiad makatukuh i Pei-cin, taluma' i Cun-hay pahanhan. ci Cuo-en mihapu miwawah tu la-ta miadih tu tapukuwan, kya matineng tu nikaydaan nu hikuki, nikadan ci Cuo-en mihapuac tu sakaytapukuwan a kawawan, deben namin ku pahikukian, pasaluimengen namin ku hikuki, ci kalamkam ci Maw-ce-tun tayni pakatineng a ci Cuo-en naicuwa matineng tu nipilaliw ni Lin-pewan, itini ci Cuo-en miwanan milimad taydan i zen-min-ta-hun timula nu caycaywal a dabekan. 1971Âπ¥9Êúà, 118ÂÆ§. Ni-ke'-sen, midis ci Lin, midis ci Kug atu midis ci Ten caysiw piccay mihcaan lim bulad tusiw demiad, mihang ci Maw-ce-tun ci Cuo-en-lay, tawya nu dimiad cunhun pasayda ci Ni-ke'-sen patahekal tu "kumuan", manamuh tu nikatayni ni Ci-sin-ci, mihimicu tu sasakamuen. putu bulad caynem demiad, Cuo Mea tusa a kanatalan malecad ku nipihapuan, mihapu tu nika tayni ni Ni-ke'-sen, caysep bulad tunem demiad, tusa nu kanatalan pulung masasudang malaheci kina kawawan. caysep bulad tulim demiad, Lein-he-kuo tahun malakuuy ku nikasasuwalan, pabelih tu Cun-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i lein-he-kuo hamin nu kinlian, tawya a demiad ci Maw-ce-tun miawda ci Cuo-en-lay atu sakayhekalan nu tademaw mikaygisa, paytem patideng tu Cun-kuo dayhiw sapikaygi tu Lein-ta. caysiw picnem mihcaan siw bulad wal demiad, mahetik ku idang ni Maw-ce-tun, salabi sa ku tahuda mididaw ci Maw-ce-tun ngan, siw bulat siw demiad teban nu labii tu caysep nu tukian, matulin tu sepat a tukian milawlaw tu balucu', tepek satu ku balucu ni Maw-ce-tun. 1976Âπ¥9Êúà8Êó•, . amica yu maudip henay ci Maw-ce-tun saan anu mapatay kaku tuduhen kaku sa, katepekan ni Maw-ce-tun tawya a demiad paytem a hidan tu ku kidu nida tahadauc sa. .
S.PHON: == maw- ¶…ô-tun*** == maw- ¶…ô-tun ju maƒßid nikaudip ******* ¶ajwar~…æ siwr~…æu miƒß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…æad tun…ôm d…ômiad, r~…æi ¶uƒß…ôn ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ƒßu-na-s…ôn si≈ã-tan-sin î~ ° saw-san- ¶un. namaka …ôn…ôm a miƒß ¶aan, mipupu ¶ tu tu r~…æutuk ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun, pakan tu katar~…æan, mikir~…æim tu taji, mikasuj, nikatin…ô≈ãan tu sur~…æitan mar~…æi≈ãatu tu mi…ôdap misur~…æit. ¶ajsiw r~…æun…ôm miƒß ¶aan maw- ¶…ô-tun mir~…æ…ô ¶ad tu ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia.s…ô-nuo tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ô tu nikadan nu sakaudip maƒßida u "siidaaj nu mar~…æukaj". ¶ajsiw r~…æusiw miƒß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…æad tuwar~…æ dimiad, maw- ¶…ô-min itida i su-r~…æ…ôn-muo-s…ô-k…ô kun ¶…ôn kanatar~…æ nipijukiw, mir~…æajdi tu kaka ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun misur~…æi tu r~…æir~…æipaw, ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn "r~…æus…ôp miƒß ¶aan nikudan, par~…æuma mikawaw ƒß…ônaj tu mar~…æukaj nu nijadu î~ °an pa ¶akaj tu tuud. sipakajda i ¶un-kuo nakamuan, sadikudaj nu tur~…æuaj a miƒß ¶aan u siidaaj nu mar~…æukaj". ***********, ." mapatid…ô≈ã tu ¶un-ƒßua-zin-min-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun kinapina atu ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan nida ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…æ…ôn musakamu tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn pasajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…æ…ôn wamanida ¶i maw- ¶u-s…ôn mi ¶akaj tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umaƒßan, u udip tu ku madat…ô≈ãaj, nanai î~ ° ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° i mar~…æ…ôkakaaj, ƒßi ¶aƒßi ¶a…ôn musakamu kaisa mit…ô≈ãir~…æ. simsim satu kaku, ¶aaj kaw nu r~…æuma î~ ° a ¶a ¶aj kina kawaw, pasusiakaj tu a kawawan, tada madat…ô≈ã tu aƒßi ¶an ku nipisumad tu siakaj, kja ¶aaj ka r~…æaƒßat kinakawaw, sisa pajt…ôm satu kaku mikir~…æim tu aƒßi ¶an mi…ôdap ku pakuju ¶aj nu mar~…æukaj a dadana." ." ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan tu par~…æar~…æudan, tajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ¶…ôn-sa, tajda i sin î~ °-sin mi ¶udad, sajawaj makaadiƒß tu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ƒßun "min-r~…æi-paw", matin…ô≈ã tu sun- ¶un-san atu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ƒßun, ¶i ƒßun-sin itida i kun- ¶uo mir~…æir~…æid tu miƒßantajaj nu ƒßitaj atu ƒßun-ƒßua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, mar~…æi≈ãatu mi…ôdap ¶i sun- ¶un-san k…ô-min-dan. mas…ôkin ni maw- ¶…ô-tun ku sin î~ °-sin a ¶a ¶udadan, i ¶a ¶udadan paduƒß…ôpit ¶i nida tu sapib…ôr~…æinaw tu ¶in- ¶aw, patid…ô≈ã tu min-kuo, pataƒß…ôkar~…æ patid…ô≈ã ¶i sun- ¶un-san mar~…æa tabakiaj nu ¶un-tun, ¶i kan-ju-wi mar~…æa ¶on-r~…æi, ¶i r~…æi≈ã- ¶i- ¶aw mar~…æasakaj ƒß…ôkar~…æ nu taƒßudan, patid…ô≈ã musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanajuaj nu buk…ôsan. ******, . r~…æima bur~…æad, r~…æabuaj nu kanatar~…æ mar~…æi≈ãatu mib…ôr~…æin tu siƒßu pa ¶akaj tu dadan nu sir~…æamar~…æaj, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nu ƒß…ôni mir~…æabu tina kawawan, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nida mar~…æuajaw mipusut tu buk…ônida, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nida ku pina nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu tad…ômawan mipusut tu buk…ôs. **, . w…ôn-ƒßua ta-k…ô-min atu nika bar~…æaki a nikaudip ******** ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj miƒß ¶aan siwa a bur~…æad, pajt…ôm ku masakaputaj ni r~…æin-p…ôaw, amipataj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tuna≈ã i nipikata ¶uwa ¶uwaan, par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, siwa bur~…æad pitu d…ômiad ¶i r~…æan-r~…æi-kuo pasajda i "r~…æ…ôn-ƒß…ô- ¶in-duj" miƒßapu tu "ji- ¶i- ¶…ôn-p…ôi, siwa bur~…æad war~…æu d…ômiad misur~…æit ¶i r~…æin-p…ôaw tu sapiƒßapu tu " dudu ¶…ôn ku kawaw, ƒßidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun makat…ô≈ãir~…æ b…ôsut sa namaka ƒß≈ã- ¶uo pasajda i san-ƒßaj, siwa a bur~…æad ¶ajtu dimiad makatukuƒß i p…ôi- ¶in, tar~…æuma î~ ° i ¶un-ƒßaj paƒßanƒßan. ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miƒßapu miwawaƒß tu r~…æa-ta miadiƒß tu tapukuwan, kja matin…ô≈ã tu nikajdaan nu ƒßikuki, nikadan ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miƒßapua ¶ tu sakajtapukuwan a kawawan, d…ôb…ôn namin ku paƒßikukian, pasar~…æuim…ô≈ã…ôn namin ku ƒßikuki, ¶i kar~…æamkam ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun tajni pakatin…ô≈ã a ¶i ¶uo-…ôn nai ¶uwa matin…ô≈ã tu nipir~…æar~…æiw ni r~…æin-p…ôwan, itini ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miwanan mir~…æimad tajdan i z…ôn-min-ta-ƒßun timur~…æa nu ¶aj ¶ajwar~…æ a dab…ôkan. *******, ****. ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn, midis ¶i r~…æin, midis ¶i kug atu midis ¶i t…ôn ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj miƒß ¶aan r~…æim bur~…æad tusiw d…ômiad, miƒßa≈ã ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…æaj, tawja nu dimiad ¶unƒßun pasajda ¶i ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn pataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu "kumuan", manamuƒß tu nikatajni ni ¶i-sin- ¶i, miƒßimi ¶u tu sasakamu…ôn. putu bur~…æad ¶ajn…ôm d…ômiad, ¶uo m…ôa tusa a kanatar~…æan mar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku nipiƒßapuan, miƒßapu tu nika tajni ni ni-k…ô î~ °-s…ôn, ¶ajs…ôp bur~…æad tun…ôm d…ômiad, tusa nu kanatar~…æan pur~…æu≈ã masasuda≈ã mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i kina kawawan. ¶ajs…ôp bur~…æad tur~…æim d…ômiad, r~…æ…ôin-ƒß…ô-kuo taƒßun mar~…æakuuj ku nikasasuwar~…æan, pab…ôr~…æiƒß tu ¶un-ƒßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo itida i r~…æ…ôin-ƒß…ô-kuo ƒßamin nu kinr~…æian, tawja a d…ômiad ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun miawda ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…æaj atu sakajƒß…ôkar~…æan nu tad…ômaw mikajgisa, pajt…ôm patid…ô≈ã tu ¶un-kuo dajƒßiw sapikajgi tu r~…æ…ôin-ta. ¶ajsiw pi ¶n…ôm miƒß ¶aan siw bur~…æad war~…æ d…ômiad, maƒß…ôtik ku ida≈ã ni maw- ¶…ô-tun, sar~…æabi sa ku taƒßuda mididaw ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun ≈ãan, siw bur~…æat siw d…ômiad t…ôban nu r~…æabii tu ¶ajs…ôp nu tukian, matur~…æin tu s…ôpat a tukian mir~…æawr~…æaw tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ °, t…ôp…ôk satu ku bar~…æu ¶u ni maw- ¶…ô-tun. *********, . ami ¶a ju maudip ƒß…ônaj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun saan anu mapataj kaku tuduƒß…ôn kaku sa, kat…ôp…ôkan ni maw- ¶…ô-tun tawja a d…ômiad pajt…ôm a ƒßidan tu ku kidu nida taƒßadau ¶ sa. .
